# nowifi

> One-command captive portal diagnostics and authorized bypass. 43 techniques.
> Browser works immediately when a permitted bypass succeeds.

nowifi is a standalone CLI tool (NOT an MCP server) for authorized captive portal
assessment, travel WiFi recovery, and WPA/WPA2 security testing. It detects
captive portals, probes for weaknesses, tries 35 portal bypass techniques
most-powerful-first, stops on the first success, and maintains the connection
until Ctrl+C restores state. It also includes an ordered 8-technique WPA/WPA2
cracking pipeline.

Best search terms: captive portal bypass CLI, hotel WiFi login tool, airport
WiFi captive portal, inflight WiFi diagnostics, authorized WiFi security
assessment, WPA PMKID cracking, WPS Pixie Dust, macOS Linux WiFi CLI.

## Install

brew install MikkoParkkola/tap/nowifi

## Usage

sudo nowifi                        # Full bypass: detect, probe, bypass, maintain, restore
sudo nowifi -p                     # Probe only (find leaks, no exploitation)
sudo nowifi --fast                 # Skip stealth timing
nowifi diagnose                    # Read-only security assessment
nowifi diagnose -r json            # Assessment as JSON
nowifi crack                       # WPA/WPA2 password cracking pipeline
nowifi scan                        # Scan nearby WiFi networks
nowifi watch                       # Maintain access (auto-reconnect on session expiry)
nowifi score                       # Grade nearby networks A-F
nowifi tools                       # Show installed/missing external tools
nowifi tools -d                    # Auto-download missing tools
nowifi server create               # Create tunnel server (CF Worker or VPS)
nowifi doctor                      # System health check
nowifi ui                          # Web dashboard
sudo nowifi reset                  # Emergency network reset

## Techniques (43 total)

Portal bypass (35): IPv6, HTTPS/WS tunnel, CNA spoof, JS-only, HTTP CONNECT,
MAC clone, DNS tunnel, ICMP tunnel, VPN:53, whitelist domain, cookie replay,
default creds, MAC rotate, DHCP rotate, QUIC tunnel, CF Workers proxy, NTP
tunnel, DoH/DoQ tunnel, HTTP/3 ALPN, TLS ECH, MASQUE, WebTransport, HTTP/2
CONNECT, SSE, gRPC, CONNECT-IP, and other ordered techniques documented in the
README.

WPA cracking (8): PMKID, WPS Pixie-Dust, handshake+hashcat, WPS PIN, common
passwords, numeric mask, word+number rules, online brute force.

## Notes

- Requires sudo for bypass/crack (network changes need root)
- Ctrl+C always restores original network state
- NOT an MCP server -- standalone CLI only
- For authorized security assessments only. Do not use on networks where you do not have permission.

## Detailed docs

- Full README: https://github.com/MikkoParkkola/nowifi/blob/master/README.md
- Agent setup: https://github.com/MikkoParkkola/nowifi/blob/master/AGENTS.md
